name: Anzac Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix oats, flour, sugar and coconut in a bowl.
2. In a saucepan, melt the golden syrup and margarine together.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the boiling water and stir into the syrup/margarine mixture.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the saucepan and mix thoroughly until combined.
5. Spoon rounded tablespoons of the dough onto greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at approximately 300 degrees F (150 degrees C).
7. Allow cookies to cool completely before storing.
